game.short_text: Confront humanity and grow your horde !
game.title: Feed the Horde

details.title: Feed the Horde
details.description:
A game developped in two days for the Kenney Jam 2022.
Starting as one confused zombie lost in the city jungle, make your way to the top of the food chain. Chase people, grow your horde, destroy everything in your path !
Controls :
    
Use the left stick or the arrow keys to move the horde.
    Press A or space to sprint. This ability is limited so use it wisely !
Some hints : 
 It's a dangerous world out there. But if your horde become big enough, you will be the danger.The northern districts are more populated but also more geared, be ready.We heard that some evil corporation has its headquarters in the business district of the city. Drop by to say hello if you pass by !

Bonus : If you want to unleash your true potential, press "P" on your keyboard to add zombies to your horde ;)Made by Jules Girard & Clément Baudonnel
Special thanks to Youri Charbonnel for playtests and game design advices :) !

Let the World Burn!!
Help the Forest Fire Grow!! Arrange the items so as to help the fire grow and bring our miserable world to an end.Resources.. decreasing and the population increasing. Soon the world will have nothing but rocks. And as a wise man once said.

game.short_text: Build a tower with random objects to escape the lava !
game.title: Thingies Tower

details.title: Thingies Tower
details.description:
This project was created for the Kenney Jam 22!
Thingies Tower is a game about building a tower with random objects given to you by a wizard in the form of cards. Go as high as you can to avoid your demise!
Controls :
Left Mouse Button - Drag and drop cards in the building area.
Arrow keys / AD  - Rotate the object before placing it.
H - Reset the high score.

game.short_text: Shoot the zombies on the growing map before they invade your castle!
game.title: Castle Blitz

details.title: Castle Blitz
details.description:
We made a game where the map grows after every wave, spawning unique enemies and new tiles. As you progress, you grow your arsenal of weapons to fight back against the sieging undead. Don't let them destroy your castle!
Player Controls --
Left Click - Shoot
Right Click - Pan Camera
Middle Mouse - Center Camera
Scroll Wheel - Zoom in and out
Kill all enemies AND spawners to finish the wave
Spawners are tiles with an orange highlight that endlessly spawn new enemies. Destroy them fast or you will be overwhelmed!
This game was made by a team of three in 48 hours for Kenney Jam 2022!
Known Issues:
-Exit button is not working (press alt f4 to get out)
-The game ends after pressing the 'next wave' button on wave 10 instead of after you beat the wave
-Rarely the player loses the ability to target a spawner tile
-The price shown for the 'projectile speed' and 'damage' upgrades are initially the wrong numbers (shows $10 instead of $5). They update to correct numbers after first purchase

details.title: Space Swarm
details.description:
Play in fullscreen for the intended experience.
----------
Save the galaxy from the evil mecha-spider! It won't be easy, you'll need to collect energy in order to grow your swarm and defeat all adversities in your way!
Controls:
- WASD or Arrows to move
- Click on the different spaceship buttons to create them

Art and Design by: Samuel Moya
Dev and Tech by: Aniol Andrés

details.title: Golfinity
details.description:
Welcome to Golfinity, the infinite minigolf course!With each turn you take, the course will grow further away from you! Can you play well enough to keep up? Harder difficulties make the course grow more per turn! 
If you can land your ball in the final segment, you'll pin the course and it won't be able to run away unless you leave or sink the putt! 
Cross your fingers that my flood fill algorithm fails and the course gets trapped! 
=-=-=--=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-Controls:
W/S - Increase/decrease shot strengthA/D - Adjust aimArrow Keys - Rotate cameraSpacebar - Hit ball (Only on your turn!) Stuck? Press ESCAPE and click Give Up to return to the main menu!=-=-=--=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-=-
Made for the 2022 Kenney jamAll art assets are from KenneyAll sounds are from freesound.org

Grow your land by placing blocks & buildings whilecarefully planning your placements,and make your own little world in this small idle game.

game.short_text: Expand across and extract the galaxy!
game.title: Spiral

details.title: Spiral
details.description:
Expand across the galaxy by establishing mining colonies on bountiful planets. Before a planet is completely extracted, build ships to colonize new planets. If you do not expand, your species will go extinct!

How to play
You start off on an empty planet and can move to a mining planet by left clicking the route between them. After a while the mining planet will run out of resources and become empty. Before that happens you can build ships that will launch when a mining planet becomes empty. You can make bigger ships that will carry spare resources to other planets.
The game ends when all mining planets become empty.
Controls
Movement: Left Click on travel routes between planets.Building Ships: Left Click on launch points on mining colonies. You can stack the amount of resources that will be launched from the planet and transported to the new planet.Mining: Press space to speed up the extraction of resources on a mining colony.
Routes turn bright yellow when ships land on planets that have already been discovered.
Background
Submitted to Kenney Jam 2022 with the theme of Growth.
Credits
Made using Godot. Sprites were made by Kenney. Sound FX made with sfxr. Check out my twitter too!
Credit to flowerhead for the music track "Orbish". Check out their soundcloud and youtube channel!

Specific Kenney assets used:

UI Pack: Space Expansion
Simple Space
Board Game Icons
Pattern Pack
Game Icons
Kenney Fonts

game.short_text: A chill, juicy, medieval-themed building game.
game.title: Medieval Juice

details.title: Medieval Juice
details.description:
Summary

Medieval Juice is a chill, juicy, medieval-themed building game that is initially created during the Kenney Jam 2022 in a few hours and is currently in development.
At its current phase, it is more than an interactive application when clicks spawn buildings, rather than a game.
I plan to add (added in v2) procedural maps, and a point system (abandoned) where each placed building yield points based on its neighbors.
Controls

Place, Rotate Building: Left Mouse Button
Reset Building Rotation: Right Mouse Button
Rotate Map: Q & E or 1 & 2
Move Camera: W, A, S & D or Arrow Keys
Restart: R Key or Spacebar
Credits

Authors
Ata Deniz Oktay - Game Design & Programming
Assets
Visual Assets - Kenney
Background Music - Ben Burnes

game.short_text: Save a tree in this retro adventure game created for Kenney Jam 2022
game.title: The Great Tree

details.title: The Great Tree
details.description:
The Great Tree
You are a witch tasked with saving the Great Tree.
A short top-down retro adventure game created for Kenney Jam 2022 (theme: "Growth").
Keyboard controls: "WASD" or arrow keys to move, "e" or "enter" to select.
Important update: The game tells you to press "esc" for "menu" and "back", but don't do it if you're playing in a browser! I'll upload a fix after the game jam is over, but, until then, you won't be missing out on anything but the menu music as you don't actually need to pause. To get out of "journal" and "inventory" screens, you can press "j" or "i" a second time.
For an immersive web experience (and crisper pixel art), click the bottom-right arrows to expand to full screen (may need to click again to regain keyboard focus). Or download the Windows exe below.
Credits
- All art, fonts and most sound effects from Kenney
- Music and stingers from JRPG Collection by Yubatake/OpenGameArt.Org
- "Fire Crackling" from AntumDeluge/OpenGameArt.Org
- "Stream Sounds" from kurt/OpenGameArt.Org
- "Forest Ambience" from TinyWorlds/OpenGameArt.Org 
- Pixel art outline shader from weekend, GDQuest and contributors
- Dialogue and quest-tracking using Ink Engine with paulloz's godot-ink
- Created with Godot

game.short_text: Make your mushrooms grow by commanding a group of small color-changing creatures born from a cloud.
game.title: KINOKO

details.title: KINOKO
details.description:
Make your mushrooms grow by commanding a group of small color-changing creatures born from a cloud... wait... WHAT?
This is my submission for the Kenney Jam 2022. The theme was GROWTH.

Your goal is to make grow the three mushrooms until all of them reach (or surpass) the line in the middle of the screen. To achieve this, you can fly around and shout different commands to the creatures.
These are your controls:

Ok, but what the commands do?
"S" command sends a creature to SLEEP for 5 seconds."D" command makes a creature perfom a fancy DASH to run or avoid mushrooms."F" command FLIPS a creature while walking.
Let's see them in action...

What happens when a creature collide with a mushroom of its same color? Easy: the mushroom grows and the creature flips. It's the only way the mushrooms can grow.

What happens then when a creature and a mushroom of different colors collide? The mushroom shrinks, the creature changes its color to the color of the mushroom and flips. It could seem a bad thing, but sometimes you will need to change the color of a creature in spite of the mushroom shrinking.

You have 5 minutes to exceed the line with all mushrooms at the same time. The remaining time is your score.
And that's all! Please enjoy.

All images, sounds and fonts by Kenney! :)Design and programming by David (@drnlab).Music included in this (humble) bundle.
